Contacts.PeopleAndOrganizations: Relationship credentials with people and organizations appear here.
Contacts.IsOfferingYouAContact: is offering to connect with you
Contacts.ContactOnTheWay: Your contact is on the way
Contacts.RemoveCaption: You will lose your connection with this contact. They will no longer be able to send you messages or credential offers.
Contacts.YouDoNotHaveAnyContacts: You don't have any contacts yet
Contacts.TourAddDescription: Add contacts by scanning a QR code or sharing your own code. Contacts can send you credentials and messages.

Connections.PeopleAndOrganizations: Chat connections with people and organizations appear here.

WhatAreConnections.Title: What are Connections?
WhatAreConnections.Preamble:
Connections are secure messaging channels with people and organizations.

Unlike Contacts (which are relationship credentials stored in your wallet), Connections enable real-time chat and credential exchange.

With connections, you can:
WhatAreConnections.DifferenceFromContacts: Connections are different from Contacts. Contacts are formal relationships represented by credentials that you store in your wallet.
WhatAreConnections.ManageConnections: You can manage your connections from

WhatAreContacts.Title: What are Contacts?
WhatAreContacts.Preamble:
Contacts are relationship credentials stored in your wallet that represent formal connections with people and organizations.

Unlike messaging connections, Contacts are verifiable credentials that prove your relationship with the issuer.

With contacts, you can:
WhatAreContacts.RemoveContacts: You can manage your contacts from your

WhatAreContactsAddendum.DifferenceFromConnections: Contacts are different from Connections. Connections are messaging channels that appear in the Messages tab for real-time chat.

Discovery.Title: Witness Discovery
Discovery.NoWitnessesFound: No witnesses found on the local network
Discovery.NoWitnessesHint: Make sure a witness server is running and you're on the same network

Connection.PromptMessage: Do you want to connect to {{name}}?

Reconnection.DuplicateInvitation: This invitation has already been used
Reconnection.MaxRetriesExceeded: Unable to establish connection after multiple attempts
Reconnection.CleanupFailed: Failed to clean up previous connection records

WitnessTimeout.Title: Witness Not Responding
WitnessTimeout.Message: The witness "{{witnessName}}" did not respond within 60 seconds.
WitnessTimeout.Info: The witness server may be offline or experiencing high load. You can retry or proceed without witness protection.

VPSubmissionFailed.Title: Submission Failed
VPSubmissionFailed.Message: Failed to submit credentials to the witness "{{witnessName}}".
VPSubmissionFailed.Info: A network error occurred while communicating with the witness. You can retry or proceed without witness protection.

SessionTimeout.Title: Session Could Not Be Established
SessionTimeout.Message: Could not establish a witness session with "{{witnessName}}".
SessionTimeout.Info: The witness may be busy or your connection may have been interrupted. You can retry or proceed without witness protection.

CounterpartyNotConnected.Title: Contact Not on Witness
CounterpartyNotConnected.Info: For witnessed exchange, both parties must be connected to the same witness. Ask your contact to connect to the witness and try again.

BiometricCancelled.Title: Verification Cancelled
BiometricCancelled.Info: The credential was not sent because biometric confirmation is required for hardware-backed signing.

BiometricFailed.Title: Verification Failed
BiometricFailed.Info: Please try again. Make sure your fingerprint or face is properly positioned.

StaleWitness.Title: Witness Disconnected
StaleWitness.Info: The witness connection may have timed out or been interrupted. Please reconnect to the witness to continue with witnessed exchange.

NetworkError.Title: Connection Error
NetworkError.Message: A network error occurred during the exchange.
NetworkError.Info: Please check your network connection and try again.

Options.WhatToDo: What would you like to do?
Options.ProceedWithoutDescription: Send credential without witness protection (reduced trust)
